title: Sozu Cluster Configuration
description: Configuration for a backend cluster in the Sōzu HTTP reverse proxy. A cluster groups multiple backend server instances that receive forwarded traffic from Sozu frontends.

sticky_session.description: Whether to enable sticky session (session affinity) for this cluster.

https_redirect.description: Whether to redirect HTTP requests to HTTPS for this cluster.

load_balancing.description: Load balancing algorithm for distributing requests across backends.

proxy_protocol.description: PROXY protocol version to send to backends.

backends.description: List of backend server instances in this cluster.

backend_id.description: Unique identifier for this backend instance.

address.description: IP address or hostname of the backend server.

port.description: TCP port of the backend server.

weight.description: Relative weight for load balancing (higher = more traffic).

connection_timeout.description: Connection timeout to backend in milliseconds.
